summary: Lead accepts M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 for PR integration after systems_architect REVIEW and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The graph is planning-only, all downstream M5 tasks remain DRAFT, M5 formal passage and manual node battle remain Human Gates, and no product/package/content/tool/CI/gate/roadmap/ADR/manifest path is changed.
commit: e9786544 plus uncommitted QA and lead ACCEPT state

tests_run.command: taskctl validate all M5 task files
tests_run.result: All 10 M5 task files are valid.
No whitespace errors before lead ACCEPT state update.

decisions: Accept M5 task graph for PR integration.
Keep downstream M5 tasks DRAFT until the graph enters main and closure promotes the first dependency-ready task.
Do not mark M5 formally passed; M5 formal passage remains Human Gate.
Do not start manual node battle implementation; manual node battle remains Human Gate.
Preserve M4_GATE PASS_WITH_LIMITS as a process limit, not systems acceptance.
risks: This acceptance is planning-only and does not prove playable slice, AI run, player research, performance, or distributable evidence.
Downstream M5 tasks include Human Gate and R3/R4 risks that must be enforced task by task.
requested_action: Commit QA and lead ACCEPT state, run integration checks, open PR, wait for CI, merge, sync main, close M5-TASK-GRAPH-001, and then select the next dependency-ready M5 task without bypassing Human Gates.
